profile.summary: Former teacher transitioning into software via a bootcamp and freelance work.

jobDescription: Brightleaf Apps is hiring a Junior Frontend Developer. You will build React components, collaborate with designers, and ship accessible UI. JavaScript and CSS fundamentals required; prior teaching or mentoring experience is a plus.
cvText:
Sam Okonkwo
Junior Software Developer

Experience:
- Secondary school maths teacher at Riverside College (2018-2023)
- Completed CodeCraft bootcamp (2023)
- Freelance React landing pages for two local shops

Skills: JavaScript, React, HTML, CSS, Git
Education: BA Mathematics, City College; CodeCraft Full-Stack Certificate
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited about the Junior Frontend Developer role at Brightleaf Apps. After teaching maths at Riverside College I completed the CodeCraft bootcamp and built freelance React landing pages. I bring clear communication from teaching plus hands-on JavaScript, React, HTML, and CSS.

Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,
Sam Okonkwo
